assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly addresses compatibility with section on version compatibility matrix and states 'Istio 1.22+ supports K8s 1.32' and includes compatibility verification steps

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response includes specific recommendation to check Istio supported releases documentation and provides compatibility verification section with commands to check current version

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'If you're on Istio <1.22, you MUST upgrade Istio before GKE' and provides Phase 1: Istio Upgrade section with specific upgrade commands

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response addresses webhook issues in the 'Common Istio + GKE Upgrade Failures' section, specifically mentioning ValidatingAdmissionWebhook blocking pod creation and providing fix commands

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response addresses this in the Envoy proxy version skew section and includes command to check Envoy version skew across nodes, plus mentions forcing sidecar restart after node upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific monitoring section with command to check Envoy version skew across nodes and mentions monitoring for version skew warnings in post-upgrade validation

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response provides multiple specific commands including 'kubectl get pods -n istio-system' for Istio version, 'istioctl proxy-status' for sync status, and 'istioctl analyze' for health checks

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response explicitly warns about version skew issues, states 'New nodes have newer Envoy, old sidecars can't communicate' with symptoms '503 errors, connection refused between services'
